title: Tech Lead Backend Engineer
summary: Tech Lead Backend Engineer with 13 years of experience. Focused on measurable outcomes, cross-functional collaboration and reliable knowledge graph extraction signals. Core strengths include Spring Boot, Docker, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL.
